testcase.name: test_products_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 6, 'products': [{'active': True, 'credits': 100, 'id': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 300, 'id': 2, 'name': 'Pro', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 1000, 'id': 3, 'name': 'Enterprise', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 50, 'id': 4, 'name': 'Small Pack', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 150, 'id': 5, 'name': 'Medium Pack', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 500, 'id': 6, 'name': 'Large Pack', ...}], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_creatorstudio_new_features.py:71: in test_products_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'count': 6, 'products': [{'active': True, 'credits': 100, 'id': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 300, 'id': 2, 'name': 'Pro', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 1000, 'id': 3, 'name': 'Enterprise', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 50, 'id': 4, 'name': 'Small Pack', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 150, 'id': 5, 'name': 'Medium Pack', ...}, {'active': True, 'credits': 500, 'id': 6, 'name': 'Large Pack', ...}], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.name: test_currencies_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'currencies': [{'code': 'USD', 'name': 'US Dollar', 'symbol': '$'}, {'code': 'EUR', 'name': 'Euro', 'symbol': '€'}, {'code': 'AUD', 'name': 'Australian Dollar', 'symbol': 'A$'}, {'code': 'CAD', 'name': 'Canadian Dollar', 'symbol': 'C$'}, {'code': 'SGD', 'name': 'Singapore Dollar', 'symbol': 'S$'}, {'code': 'INR', 'name': 'Indian Rupee', 'symbol': '₹'}, ...], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_creatorstudio_new_features.py:85: in test_currencies_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'currencies': [{'code': 'USD', 'name': 'US Dollar', 'symbol': '$'}, {'code': 'EUR', 'name': 'Euro', 'symbol': '€'}, {'code': 'AUD', 'name': 'Australian Dollar', 'symbol': 'A$'}, {'code': 'CAD', 'name': 'Canadian Dollar', 'symbol': 'C$'}, {'code': 'SGD', 'name': 'Singapore Dollar', 'symbol': 'S$'}, {'code': 'INR', 'name': 'Indian Rupee', 'symbol': '₹'}, ...], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.name: test_privacy_my_data

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('email' in {'data': {'credits': {'balance': 52.0, 'updatedAt': '2026-02-15T17:21:46.356513'}, 'generationsCount': 12, 'paymentsCount': 0, 'profile': {'createdAt': '2026-02-15T16:16:34.986476', 'email': 'corstest1771172193@example.com', 'name': 'CORS Test User', 'role': 'USER'}}, 'message': 'Your personal data has been retrieved', 'success': True} or 'user' in {'data': {'credits': {'balance': 52.0, 'updatedAt': '2026-02-15T17:21:46.356513'}, 'generationsCount': 12, 'paymentsCount': 0, 'profile': {'createdAt': '2026-02-15T16:16:34.986476', 'email': 'corstest1771172193@example.com', 'name': 'CORS Test User', 'role': 'USER'}}, 'message': 'Your personal data has been retrieved', 'success': True})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_creatorstudio_new_features.py:227: in test_privacy_my_data assert "email" in data or "user" in data E AssertionError: assert ('email' in {'data': {'credits': {'balance': 52.0, 'updatedAt': '2026-02-15T17:21:46.356513'}, 'generationsCount': 12, 'paymentsCount': 0, 'profile': {'createdAt': '2026-02-15T16:16:34.986476', 'email': 'corstest1771172193@example.com', 'name': 'CORS Test User', 'role': 'USER'}}, 'message': 'Your personal data has been retrieved', 'success': True} or 'user' in {'data': {'credits': {'balance': 52.0, 'updatedAt': '2026-02-15T17:21:46.356513'}, 'generationsCount': 12, 'paymentsCount': 0, 'profile': {'createdAt': '2026-02-15T16:16:34.986476', 'email': 'corstest1771172193@example.com', 'name': 'CORS Test User', 'role': 'USER'}}, 'message': 'Your personal data has been retrieved', 'success': True})

testcase.name: test_admin_analytics_overview
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_creatorstudio_new_features.py:270: in test_admin_analytics_overview assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
